reviewed_items.reviewer_notes: All gates passed. Gate 3 (Code Verification): Code reading is factually correct - BlobRPCMinValidSlot (rpc_blob_sidecars_by_range.go:136-148) calculates minStart = max(currEpoch - minReqEpochs, DenebForkEpoch) with no FULU deprecation check. Gate 4 (Exploitability): An attacker can trigger this via P2P by sending BlobSidecarsByRangeRequest after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS, causing the handler to serve blobs instead of responding empty/rejecting. Gate 5 (Spec Reference): 01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json:770-786 property PROP-6a4369e9-inv-028 requires "current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => respond_empty_or_reject" per SG-011 blob_sidecars_by_range_deprecated spec. Severity: Medium severity is appropriate - Prysm's 31% network share could cause interoperability issues if other clients correctly implement deprecation while Prysm continues serving blobs, potentially leading to protocol divergence during transition period. Impact exceeds Medium threshold (>5% of network). Verdict: CONFIRMED_POTENTIAL rather than CONFIRMED_VULNERABILITY because actual impact depends on whether other clients also implement deprecation correctly and whether the protocol can tolerate mixed behavior during transition.
reviewed_items.spec_reference: blob_sidecars_by_range must be fully deprecated after FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS. Assertion: current_epoch >= FULU_FORK_EPOCH + MIN_EPOCHS_FOR_BLOB_SIDECARS_REQUESTS => respond_empty_or_reject (01e_PARTIAL_W2B3_1771748669.json PROP-6a4369e9-inv-028, covers SG-011)
